item.title: Bradley the Badger to be published by Focus Entertainment
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Genre-bending action adventure game signed.

Focus Entertainment will publish the December 2025-announced genre-bending action adventure game Bradley the Badger developed by Day 4 Night, the companies announced.

The game has so far been announced for PC (Steam), “with the team exploring additional platforms and consoles.” A release date has not been announced.

“Focus Entertainment supports projects that carry a strong vision, a clear identity, and the promise of a unique experience for players,” said Focus Entertainment Publishing deputy chief executive officer Vincent Chataignier in a press release. “Bradley the Badger immediately stood out through its tone, personality, and potential. We are very proud to partner with Day 4 Night, a studio founded by highly accomplished and experienced creators, to amplify the excitement surrounding this exceptional game and help it fully realize its potential.”

Day 4 Night co-founders and game directors Davide Soliani and Christian Cantamessa added, “With Bradley the Badger, we set out to create an adventure shaped by everything we love about games, their sense of wonder, their ability to surprise and the emotional stories behind them. It is a project about imagination, creativity and rediscovering the spark that made us fall in love with video games. This is exactly the kind of original, sincere and fun experience Day 4 Night was founded to make. Focus Entertainment is the ideal partner for Bradley. They are known for their respect for creative talent, belief in bold ideas and ability to bring them to players around the world.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Focus Entertainment:

About

Bradley the Badger is a new original intellectual property from award-winning game creators Christian Cantamessa (Red Dead Redemption) and Davide Soliani (Mario + Rabbids). Unveiled during The Game Awards 2025 ceremony with a standout trailer, Bradley the Badger is an extraordinary adventure combining action, exploration and puzzles, all driven by a surprising and offbeat story packed with references to some of the greatest video game genres of all time.

Bradley the Badger is the first project from Day 4 Night Studios, founded in 2024 by a multi-disciplinary team of industry veterans who have contributed to global blockbuster franchises and worked together for over fifteen years. The game draws on the extensive experience of its founders to take players on a journey that celebrates the art of video games.

A Love Letter to Video Games

In Bradley the Badger, players will step into the shoes of Bradley, the beloved mascot of a classic platform game, brought to life by Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actor Evan Peters.

Lost and far from home, our hero is pulled into a series of unfamiliar, hostile and curiously unfinished worlds, trapped in the depths of development hell. Through Bradley’s enthusiastic and playful eyes, players will develop abilities reminiscent of a game developer’s toolkit, enabling them to bend the rules, reshape environments, and perhaps even save Bradley’s home.

Watch the partnership announcement video below.

Publisher Announce Trailer
